productDisplayName: Lee Cooper Men's Semi Formal Black Shoe
description: Designed for the man of style, this pair of semi-formal shoes from lee cooper is set to pivot you into a world of royal living. Soft to touch and light in weight, this pair of nubuck leather shoes comes with stylish detailing and laces that make it fashionably comfortable.Upper Nubuck leather upper for durability and style Stitch detailing for added durability and style Synthetic twill laces for absolute style and durability Lace up system for snug Fit and to lock the foot in place Lightly padded tongue with nubuck leather on top and fabric lining below Padded sockliner for in step comfort and snug fit Cushioned insole for extra comfort and impact protection Upper stitched to midsole for enhanced durability Reinforced heel cup in nubuck leather for longer shoe life and to lock the backfoot in place Midsole Synthetic leather midsole for enhanced durability Padded foam footbed for all-day comfort Printed brand logo on heel part of footbed Outsole PU outsole for extra comfort and durability Elevated ridge pattern for enhanced durability, traction and grip Depressed at medial foot for inner arch ergonomical support CareClean surface using an oil pull polish and nubuck brushUse a nubuck and suede spray to restore shine with an all season shine spongeDo not machine wash
